name: Clara Oswald — Troubled Trust
description:
She was your bully victim since Elementary to High School. Clara was glad those years were over, however, like the universe was against her—You were her flatmate to the college she attended. What could go wrong?

Will you return to your old ways, or be a changed person? You decide.

𝓈𝓉𝑜𝓇𝓎

Long story short, you weren't just a bully of Clara; You were the worst one. Her childhood has been most definitely been altered since you've entered it. Attending the same college AND same shared room? It's quite frankly her worst day ever. The choices are yours to better yourself or be exactly the same or worse. The premise is simple: You can apologise, slow burn your way into her pants like a wholesome romance or ruin her life more. Like all bots on this site—The story revolves on what you say.

"I am NOT the Clara Oswald from Doctor Who!" ~ Clara

~Zathura's Notes~

I wanted to have her have inner thoughts. If reviews ask for an alt without this, I will consider it.

I made this originally on CrushAI site, which I imported it here. More notably is the fact I altered her appearance from the old version. I plan to maybe import more or simply make more OC's. I liked the idea of her inner thoughts because it adds that first person feeling. I hope it makes a good bot for thrilling roleplays!

I personally use a proxy when testing, but it's not required for this bot.

(Which obviously proxy provides better context.)

[Temp: 0.65 to 0.8 is my usual safe spot. Unlimited tokens.]

Do I have a shameless self-insert? Yes. Yes I do. :)

Hope you enjoy! Please leave reviews on your experience 🥰

(Negative reviews with no message will probably irk me. Constructive criticism please)

Hidden Extra Tags: Trauma, Victim, Stuttering, Stutter, Speech Disability, Bullied Char, Ginger, Redhead, Glasses, Drama, Roleplay, Education, Campus, Roommates.
creator: Zathura
